creator: ngsfw@comcast.net
text:
----- edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Update port: security/xyssl
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: edwin
> State-Changed-When: Wed Oct 15 00:40:10 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Awaiting maintainers feedback (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=128109

Hello,
I am the maintainer of the port.  The email address listed on the port is no longer utilized.  I now primarily use my sourceforge.net alias for software-related emails, since it'll come with me if I change providers.  I haven't been able to access the www.xyssl.org website for some time now; I'd been looking to update the port in case there was a newer version, but after some time of no luck and a non-working port, I think it needs to start down the path towards removal.  I'm not sure what's up with it, bu t it isn't resolving, and the only email address I have for the software's author is @xyssl.org, which is not working either.  
- Matt
